text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 27 

NC_NVGTN_CASE_STRT_DT 

LABEL: Navigation Case Opt In Date 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation case (NC) opt in date. 

LONG NAME: NC_NVGTN_CASE_STRT_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: Format: DDMONYYYY (e.g., 21DEC2019) 

COMMENT: Dates are from May 3, 2018–April 24, 2023. 

For each navigation-eligible beneficiary who opted in for and received navigation
